sectors.name: Financial Services
sectors.description: Banking, insurance, and capital markets data protection requirements including BNM RMiT, PCI DSS, and card data security.

sectors.name: Healthcare
sectors.description: Medical data protection including patient records, HL7/FHIR security, diagnostic imaging, and medical device data.

sectors.name: Government
sectors.description: Government data classification (RAHSIA/SULIT), MyGovCloud requirements, and official secrets protection.
